meta.title: A SBOM'd Substation
meta.description:
Experiment: Try to collect, correlate, and operationalize SBOMs for everything in a substation.

Matt Wyckhouse and the team at Finite State and Alex Waitkus and the team at Southern Co. tried to do this. They went into the substation, physically inventoried all of their equipment, collected data from their sensors, and started collecting SBOMs from their vendors.

Hear about the successes and problems, resolved and open issues, and what asset owners can realistically look forward to if they try to broadly use SBOMs.
